summary: Tested all 3 new features: filter toggles, pagination, and user management. All backend APIs pass (16/16). All frontend flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: The 'Add User' button is in the top-right of the viewport (x=1756) which overlaps with the welcome toast on initial page load. The force=True click works but there's a brief window where the button might be obscured. No fix needed as it auto-dismisses.
Non-issue: The technician 'must_change_password=true' blocks login via the change-password flow. This is by design - tested via backend API directly.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted testtech01 user during testing. No persistent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features fully tested and passing. Admin creds: admin/Admin@12345. 1 computer record (UI-FORM-SAVE-001, status=In Stock) in DB. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py. Tested: filter toggles (All/In Stock Only/Sold Only), aria-pressed states, pagination (Previous/Next buttons, Page X of Y, disabled states), User Management CRUD (add/reset-pw/delete), cannot-delete-own-account guard, non-admin 403 protection.
